title: Kofu, Yamanashi — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kofu, Yamanashi: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kofu is a city in Yamanashi with a population of 195,000. A basin city surrounded by mountains in Yamanashi, famous for its vineyards, fruit orchards, and views of Mount Fuji.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
